subcodes.first_line: O ye fruitful saplings in the garden of the love of God, immersed at all times in the ocean of His divine character [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهالهای بارور بوستان محبت الله در جمیع احیان مستغرق دریای خلق و خوی حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
